_comment: Edit this file to customize job search behavior. No code changes needed.
_sort_by_comment: DD = most recent first. R = most relevant.
_max_days_old_comment: Primary filter: skip jobs older than this many days. 0 = no limit.
_max_candidates_comment: Max job cards to collect per scrape attempt.
_job_workers_comment: Parallel workers for resume/cover-letter generation. 2 is safe for Claude Max.

fallback._comment: Triggered when primary scrape yields fewer jobs than target_count. Stages run in order until targets are met.

ai._comment: AI / ML Engineer roles — broader filter since fewer entry-level AI jobs exist
